raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.","explanation":"The word “disastrous” is an emotive, value-laden descriptor that goes beyond neutral reporting and frames the findings in dramatic terms."},{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.","explanation":"Calling the increase an “effect of the pandemic” asserts causation in the author’s voice, while the study reports an association; this presents a contested causal claim as fact without explicit attribution."}]}

detections.biasedText: A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.
detections.explanation: The word “disastrous” is an emotive, value-laden descriptor that goes beyond neutral reporting and frames the findings in dramatic terms.

detections.biasedText: A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.
detections.explanation: Calling the increase an “effect of the pandemic” asserts causation in the author’s voice, while the study reports an association; this presents a contested causal claim as fact without explicit attribution.
